title: Displaced Lebanese return as Israeli shelling violates ceasefire in south
snippet: Lebanon ceasefire Day 2: largely holding despite continued Israeli violations. Bulldozers continue demolition in south. Shelling around Beit Lif, al-Qantara and Toul. Displaced Lebanese cautiously attempting to return but face Israeli warnings. Israel maintains 'extensive security zone' to Syrian border. Netanyahu says opportunity for 'historic deal' with Beirut.
tag_reason: Day 2 update of Lebanon ceasefire with new violation details (Beit Lif, al-Qantara, Toul) and displaced return attempts
